primary.title: Password Generator - Generate Secure Passwords Online
primary.description: Create secure, strong, random passwords instantly. Customize length, numbers, and symbols. 100% offline and secure client-side generation.
primary.heading: Password Generator
primary.seo_content:
A password is a string of characters used to verify identity during authentication. In the modern web, using basic passwords like 'password123' or birthdates makes accounts highly vulnerable to brute-force credential stuffing attacks.

Using a secure random password generator beats manual patterns by introducing high-entropy characters. Our generator creates custom keys in your browser window, ensuring no credentials are ever sent online.

examples.title: Generating regular credentials
examples.description: Create a standard 16-character secure key containing numbers and special characters to safeguard your daily social accounts.

faqs.question: Are my generated passwords private?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely. The generation runs completely on your computer via client-side JavaScript. Nothing is sent to our servers.

faqs.question: How long should a strong password be?
faqs.answer: Security experts recommend using passwords containing at least 12 to 16 characters, combining lowercase, uppercase, numbers, and special symbols.

secure-password-generator.title: Secure Password Generator - Build Strong Credentials
secure-password-generator.description: Formulate strong random credentials with high security combinations. Offline, safe, and instant client-side tool.
secure-password-generator.heading: Secure Password Generator
secure-password-generator.seo_content:
A secure password generator is a developer-grade security builder. It generates random, unguessable character arrays to protect databases, accounts, and server logins.

We employ random index mapping to guarantee high character randomness. Keep your digital files safe.

examples.title: Database login credentials
examples.description: Build a long 24-character password with full numbers and symbols to secure database configurations.

faqs.question: Can standard hackers guess these passwords?
faqs.answer: Brute-force cracking a high-entropy 16-character password would take modern supercomputers billions of years.

random-string-generator.title: Random String Generator - Create Custom Cryptic Keys
random-string-generator.description: Build random alphanumeric string codes. Custom lengths, numbers, and special symbols supported.
random-string-generator.heading: Random String Generator
random-string-generator.seo_content:
A random string generator creates arbitrary arrays of letters and digits. Developers use these for generating API keys, session tokens, verification codes, or database salt values.

Configure character length limits and toggle specific symbols to match your specifications.

examples.title: API token generation
examples.description: Create a clean alphanumeric 32-character string to serve as a secure API secret key.

faqs.question: What parameters can I customize?
faqs.answer: You can customize string length limits (from 8 to 32 characters) and toggle digits or symbols to generate strictly alphanumeric keys.
